primary_contrast: same model + same evidence + same budget, situation off versus on

data.sampling: 30 items per category x 7 categories = 210 items, seed 20260718
data.rendering: evidence-complete: claim text plus bracketed structured metadata (time, validity, status, source, scope, observers); identical evidence block for all conditions

provider: openrouter (single gateway for uniform usage and cost accounting)

fixed_controls.retries: resumable harness; rerun same command to retry errored calls

scale_and_cost.estimated_wallclock: ~1-2 h with the 7 models run as parallel processes

smoke_test.result: openrouter adapter verified end-to-end (llama-3.3-70b, gemini-2.5-flash: 8/8 calls scored); openai/gpt-5.1 blocked by HTTP 402 insufficient credits
smoke_test.blockers: OpenRouter credits exhausted (total_credits=0); native GEMINI_API_KEY invalid; xAI team has no credits
